_publications._publicationTitle: PET imaging for attention deficit preclinical drug testing in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: Using IHC (Fig. 1A) and Western blotting (Fig. 1B), we found reduced DARPP32 phosphorylation
details: Successfully detected reduced DARPP32 phosphorylation in striatum of CKO mice using Western blotting
